rows.notes: All extractors agreed; visually confirmed as page header.

Visual inspection shows '6' in the shillings column and '14' in the pence column. The '14' in pence is an invalid value (must be 0-11) and represents '1 shilling 2 pence'. Added to the 6 shillings, this totals 7 shillings 2 pence. Gemini-flash correctly applied this conversion logic; gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '6' in pounds and '14' in shillings.

rows.description: Assessed Taxes for the Lodgings April 1839
rows.notes: Visual confirmation shows '5' in the shillings column, and '19 1/2' in the pence column. Gemini-flash correctly recognized '19d' as an invalid pence value and performed the conversion (19d = 1s 7d). This was then added to the 5s already present, resulting in 6s 7 1/2d. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '5' in pounds and '19' in shillings. Gemini-flash's description 'Assessed Taxes... April' is also more complete and accurate.
rows.english_description: Assessed taxes for the college lodgings for April 1839.

Gpt-5-mini included 'Octr' in its description, which is visually present and important context.
